---
title: "Example Usage"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{example-usage}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(fatherStay)
```

This vignette subject to change, and will likely be out of date very shortly.

```{r}
df <- simulate_data()
tail(df, 12) # last 10 are NA - to be nowcast!
```

```{r}
now_simple_models(dad ~ npos, df, model = "lm")
now_simple_models(dad ~ npos, df, model = "ar", order = 1)
```
